question: Will "Melania" Opening Weekend Box Office be less than 1.5m?
description:
This market will resolve according to how much "Melania" Opening Weekend Box Office will gross domestically on its opening weekend. The "Daily Box Office Performance" figures found on the “Box Office” tab on this movie's The Numbers (https://www.the-numbers.com/) page will be used to resolve this market once the values for the 3-day opening weekend (January 30 - February 1) are final (i.e., not studio estimates).

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Please note, this market will resolve according to the The Numbers figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc.

If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-numbers.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures.

If there is no final data available by February 8, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

Please note, this market will resolve according to the The Numbers figures provided under Weekend Box Office Performance for the 3-day weekend (which typically includes Thursday's previews), regardless of whether domestic refers to only the USA, or to USA and Canada, etc.

If there is ambiguity as to whether the resolution source's figures are final, this market will remain open until both https://www.boxofficemojo.com/ and https://www.the-numbers.com/ have confirmed their finalized figures.

If there is no final data available by February 8, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

question: Map Handicap: IK (-1.5) vs Charrados FC (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between internet kings and Charrados FC in the CCT South America Series #7 Group Stage, scheduled for January 15 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "internet kings" if internet kings wins 2 or more maps than Charrados FC in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Charrados FC".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Will the announcers say "Heisman" 5+ times during the National College Football Championship Game?
description:
The College Football Playoff National Championship is scheduled to take place on January 19, 2026, 7PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if either a play-by-play announcer or a color commentator says the listed term at any point between kickoff and the conclusion of this game during its official broadcast. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Any usage of the term regardless of context will count toward the resolution of this market.

Plural or possessive versions of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market, regardless of the context of their use.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

If the start of this game is cancelled or otherwise delayed beyond January 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET this market will resolve to "No".

AI-generated content will not count towards the resolution of this market.

The resolution source for this market is the official ESPN broadcast of this game.

If the start of this game is cancelled or otherwise delayed beyond January 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET this market will resolve to "No".

AI-generated content will not count towards the resolution of this market.

The resolution source for this market is the official ESPN broadcast of this game.

question: Map Handicap: WIP (-1.5) vs Esprit Shōnen (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between Esprit Shōnen and WIP Esports in the VCL France: Revolution Group Stage, scheduled for January 17 at 9:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "WIP Esports" if WIP Esports wins 2 or more maps than Esprit Shōnen in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Esprit Shōnen".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Map Handicap: FUR (-1.5) vs KRÜ Esports (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between KRÜ Esports and FURIA Esports in the VCT Americas Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 16 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "FURIA Esports" if FURIA Esports wins 2 or more maps than KRÜ Esports in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "KRÜ Esports".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Tre Jones: Points O/U 12.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 16 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Tre Jones scores more than 12.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Tre Jones scores 12.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

question: Series: Execration Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Jackky and friends (+10.5)
description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between Execration and Jackky and friends in the ESL One Birmingham: Southeast Asia Closed Qualifier Playoffs, scheduled for January 15 at 11:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Execration" if Execration secures 11 or more kills than Jackky and friends in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Jackky and friends".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.
groupItemTitle: Series: Execration Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Jackky and friends (+10.5)

description:

description:

This market will resolve to "ENRAGE" if ENRAGE win the match against Haspers.

This market will resolve to "Haspers" if Haspers win the match against ENRAGE.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.
